element_introduction_order.mastery_context: unlocked via EXP system as player levels up
knocked from enemies and picked up mid-combat
found in environment or enemy drops
navigation challenge, instant loss if fallen into
new environmental layout and enemy types
Chin remains stationary if player retreats
new environmental obstacles and enemy patterns
dynamic environmental threat requiring timing awareness
wall traps and final boss gauntlet

typical_relief_triggers: enemy underling retreat after boss falls
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: escalating difficulty across four continuous stages with boss punctuation; early stage emphasizes basic combat against gangs, later stages layer environmental hazards and puzzle-like navigation with trap mechanics

difficulty_curve.early_game: Mission 1 (City Slum) introduces basic combat against Black Warriors gang members with light weapon pickups; establishes core punch/kick/throw mechanics via EXP progression
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Mission 2 (Factory) and Mission 3 (Forest) introduce environmental hazards (spikes, holes, falling stalactites) alongside increased enemy density; boss encounter with Chin features ladder climbing challenge
difficulty_curve.late_game: Mission 4 (Gang Hideout) combines multiple hazard types including wall traps with final boss Willy in main hall; culminates story rescue of Marian
notable_spikes: First boss encounter (Jack) teaches boss recognition via music cue shift
Environmental hazards introduction (spikes/holes) create new death conditions
Falling stalactite mechanics in forest require timing and spatial awareness
Final stage trap density increases significantly before Willy encounter

notable_level_patterns.description: Missions 1-3 take place on single long continuous maps rather than discrete arenas; stage changes indicated by background music shift signaling boss approach; automatic transition walk sequence between major areas maintains progression momentum
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mission 1 - City Slum to Mission 2 transition

notable_level_patterns.description: Each major area culminates in boss encounter; defeated boss triggers underling retreat and transition sequence; final stage (Mission 4) isolated on separate map for hideout-specific encounters

Mission 1 establishes basic combat; Mission 2 adds height-based navigation (Chin ladder encounter); Mission 3 introduces dynamic falling hazards (stalactites); Mission 4 combines all hazard types with trap walls
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mission 3 Forest stage with stalactite mechanic

notable_level_patterns.description: Melee and throwing weapons knocked from enemies or found in environment; pickup encourages aggressive disarming; weapons deplete or are discarded, requiring environmental scavenging
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any mission with baseball bat or whip-wielding enemies

notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage has mandatory time limit; failure to progress within window results in death; combines with environmental navigation to create pacing pressure
